feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Dreams of Drowning (All I Wanted Was You)
entry.summary:
Author: AA_BATTERY479

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,764Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: ...“You shouldn’t be here…’s not safe.”Merlin doesn’t stop, either not hearing him or ignoring the warning. Probably the latter.He crosses in front of him, and Arthur notices that his shirt is splattered with blood. “You’re bleeding,” Arthur whispers.Merlin continues. “It’s not my blood, don’t worry.”Arthur’s brain tries to make sense of that statement, fails, and promptly moves on.Merlin huffs in satisfaction when the last of the chains are removed. With nothing holding him up, Arthur slumps forward and falls into him, and Merlin lets out a little “oof” as he struggles with the sudden weight.I love you, Arthur thinks, as Merlin grunts and lifts him up, throwing his arm around his shoulder, somehow lifting his full weight. I love you. Merlin's blurry face swims above him, glancing down at Arthur every few seconds in concern, trying to figure out a plan to get out of here with Arthur's depleted strength. I love you. I love you. I love you...

  • Major Character Death

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,761Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

entry.title: willow (Arthur's Version)
entry.summary:
Author: mittwoch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 894Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Arthur tries to understand how Merlin has magic. Merlin, his dopey, loyal, manservant, of whom he considered his best friend has magic. How could he keep that from Arthur all this time?At least the thoughts distract him from the awful pain festering from his stab wound.---This story follows Arthur coming to terms with his feelings for Merlin.

entry.title: Beast Like Me
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,564Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 38

Summary: The man was beautiful. Hair as gold as dawn sunlight, eyes like the endless blue depths of a midsummer afternoon. His face was a marble angel’s, the lines of brow and cheek and jaw almost too mathematically perfect. Every good sculptor always knew to put in a flaw. His was in his front teeth, just a little too large, and it made Merlin dig his fingernails into his palms. He was lithe, muscular, dressed in black. Half-dressed - his jerkin was unbuttoned, his shirt open nearly to his navel, and he was missing a sock. His hair had the raked-through look of a man in crisis. His smile was dazzling and mad. “This,” he said, spreading his hands, “is the magnificent - nay, the opulent court of the Crown Prince of Camelot!” And then, very pleasantly - “Gaius, what the fuck is this?” OR - When Merlin goes to find Gaius, he's told that he's left Camelot. Tracing his would-be mentor, Merlin finds himself at a tumbledown castle on the edge of a hill. There are chickens, radishes, a knight who'd much rather focus on his squash and a strange voice calling in the night. And a secret hidden in the heart of Castle Perilous. The secret behind the most important rule: don't bleed.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,443Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Cursed Love
entry.summary:
Author: Nukagirl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,117Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 32

Summary: “I am just about to go get your dinner,” Merlin said, not looking up from his current job, “I’m a bit behind as I was helping Gwen earlier.”Arthur didn’t respond but he walked over to Merlin. Merlin looked up as Arthur was upon him, a look of fury in his eyes. It was too late for Merlin to move as Arthur shoved him back. The armour fell to the ground as Merlin stumbled backwards.“Wha-?” Merlin started to ask but was cut off as Arthur slapped him across the face, his eyes red with anger. Merlin backed away, his hand on his burning cheek, confusion and hurt in his eyes.xArthur has been cursed but the only one that realises is Merlin. Now, he just needs to work out how to break it before Arthur kills him

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,670Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,495Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Dragonlord's Predicament
entry.summary:
Author: JustGettingBy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,766Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 754

Summary: Merlin's new Dragonlord powers come with some unforeseen side effects. When he's kidnapped by bandits, the new aspect of his powers makes itself known. But Merlin could've gotten himself out of the mess on his own, thank you very much, if only Arthur hadn't made it worse by rushing in and trying to save him.

entry.title: The Lies We Tell
entry.summary:
Author: Saladscream

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,543Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 257

Summary: It's a lie. Merlin isn’t a lightweight, dammit. It takes more than a couple of miserly pints of beer to send him rolling under the table, and anyone who dares to say anything to the contrary is a brazen liar and an unabashed twat.

entry.summary:
Author: TheNovelNovelist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,568Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 11

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,971Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 293

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything! Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

entry.title: Pas de Deux
entry.summary:
Author: Eye_of_Desdemona

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,527Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 71

Summary: “I have seen this all before,” Merlin’s voice was steely though his hands shook at his sides.The old druid merely shook his head, “You have seen visions, Emrys, possibilities. I am offering you a certainty. Arthur’s bane will be his demise. If the boy is left alive, there will be no legacy to Arthur’s reign, only a hazy memory of a sovereign that was born in blood and died in blood.”Merlin’s eyes widened, and a stinging sensation nestled its way into his skin as the druid’s magic filled the room.“The decision is yours to make. The Triple Goddess will make her’s in return.”ORIt was always going to be Arthur. Even if it meant taking the life of one of his own, Merlin was always going to choose the path that saw Arthur live. A seer offers Emrys a choice and a promise in one, and for once Merlin acts upon it.

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,074Chapters: 10/11Kudos: 256

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

entry.title: It's A Small Crime (And I Got No Excuse)
entry.summary:
Author: amariram

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,011Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 112

Summary: “Are we waiting for your Arthur to have an audience? I'm sure my men will have captured him by now,” the man continued, crossing his arms with amusement.It was Merlin's sceptical sneer that broke Arthur's train of thought. He moved closer behind the rock wall to look at his face, and what he saw made him swallow hard. Merlin's gaze was lowered, but a bitter smile played on his lips as if the other man's words were the stupidest thing he had ever heard in his life.“For the last time...” Merlin finally said, raising his head and staring at him arrogantly. “He's not coming. He doesn't care about me.”Arthur's heart sank.The man just smiled and took another step towards Merlin. The belt holding his boots fell to the ground.“We'll see.” or Merlin has been kidnapped by Cenred’s men. Even though they haven’t spoken for weeks, Arthur goes to look for him.Struggling with resentment, they will both have to set aside their beliefs to find their way back to each other.

entry.title: Half a Crown
entry.summary:
Author: decidedlynotheterosexual

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,344Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 71

Summary: The chamber ceiling recedes, opens before them. Arthur thinks he could go far as the starless night, be swallowed there, in the belly of a great and terrible serpent. He is no-one; he is nothing. He needs another half to complete him, and without it, he is worse than dead.Arthur hears of the Écrevisse, a cave that shows both a man’s greatest fear and deepest desire. To prove himself, he goes alone. Without Merlin. Yet the cave brings Merlin to him, as Arthur’s fears and desires become one.
